story.iWant: to copy threads bidirectionally between personal and project contexts with automatic file migration
story.soThat: I can move my work between personal and collaborative spaces while preserving all content and attachments
story.tasks: - Implement Thread Context Menu (right-click shows "Copy to Personal" OR "Copy to Project...") - Implement Copy to Personal Flow (permission check, API call, file migration download) - Implement Copy to Project Flow (project selection dialog, permission check, file migration upload) - Implement File Migration Service (download Storage Service → local, upload local → Storage Service) - Implement Transactional Copy with Rollback (wrap in transaction, rollback on failure) - Implement Copy Semantics (original thread unchanged, new thread created) - Implement Cache Invalidation (invalidate project threads cache) - Testing (E2E bidirectional copy, file migration, rollback, performance)

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Right-click thread shows "Copy to Personal" OR "Copy to Project..." option
Copy to Personal: Permission check (user must be thread owner)
Copy to Personal: Thread copied with all messages to personal context
Copy to Personal: Project files in Storage Service downloaded to local filesystem
Copy to Project: Dialog shows list of user's projects (editor/owner roles only)
Copy to Project: Permission check (must have edit access to target project)
Copy to Project: Personal local files uploaded to Storage Service
Thread with files: file migration (upload or download) before copy completes
Thread with files copies in <10s for up to 10MB total attachments
File migration failure rolls back thread copy (atomic operation, transactional)
Copied thread appears in target context, original thread remains unchanged (copy semantics, not move)
Cache invalidation for target project threads (if copying to project)
API endpoint: POST /api/threads/copy with { sourceThreadId, targetContext, projectId? }

doc.section:
Copy to Personal: Project thread → Personal context - Permission: Only thread owner can copy - File migration: Download Storage Service files to local filesystem
Copy to Project: Personal thread → Project context - Permission: Must have edit access (editor/owner role) - File migration: Upload local files to Storage Service
Copy Semantics: Original thread remains in source context, copy created in target

Personal Threads: Files stored locally ({user_data_dir}/threads/{threadId}/attachments/{fileId}) Project Threads: Files stored in Storage Service (https://storage.moku.ai/projects/{projectId}/threads/{threadId}/files/{fileId}) Migration Direction: - Personal → Project: Upload local files to Storage Service - Project → Personal: Download Storage Service files to local filesystem

Option A: Copy to Personal 1. Right-click project thread → "Copy to Personal" 2. Permission check: User must be thread owner 3. API call: POST /api/threads/copy with { sourceThreadId, targetContext: 'personal' } 4. File Migration: Download files from Storage Service, save locally 5. Create new personal thread (new IDs) 6. Update attachment references: storage URL → local path 7. If migration fails: Rollback, show error 8. Original project thread unchanged
Option B: Copy to Project 1. Right-click personal thread → "Copy to Project..." 2. Dialog: Select target project (editor/owner roles only) 3. Permission check: Must have edit access 4. API call: POST /api/threads/copy with { sourceThreadId, targetContext: 'project', projectId } 5. File Migration: Upload local files to Storage Service 6. Create new project thread (new IDs) 7. Update attachment references: local path → storage URL 8. If migration fails: Rollback, show error 9. Original personal thread unchanged 10. Invalidate project threads cache
- Copy without files: <3s - Copy with files: <10s for up to 10MB total attachments - File migration: Streaming for large files (no memory overflow) - Rollback: <1s (clean up partial files)

code.file: Thread move/copy modal component Will support bidirectional copy with project selection
Will add copyThread method IPC call to backend
Will add IPC handler for threads:copy Coordinates with file service for migration
File storage service for local file operations Will integrate with Storage Service API for cloud files

dependencies.dependency: File Service required for file migration logic

constraints.constraint: Copy to Personal: User must be thread owner
Copy to Project: Must have edit access (editor/owner role)
BLOCKER: E5-S1 (File Service) required for file migration
Mitigation: Implement thread copy WITHOUT files first, add file migration when E5 complete
Copy with files: <10s for up to 10MB
File migration failure must rollback thread copy (atomic operation)
Copy semantics: Original thread unchanged, new thread created

interface.name: ThreadCopyService
interface.method: Copies project thread to personal context with file migration
Copies personal thread to project context with file migration

interface.name: API
interface.method: Copies thread with file migration Returns: { newThreadId, messageCount, fileCount, fileMigrationStatus }

tests.standards: - Unit tests: Permission checks (owner for personal, editor/owner for project) - Unit tests: File migration logic (upload/download, rollback on failure) - E2E tests: Copy personal → project with files (upload to Storage Service) - E2E tests: Copy project → personal with files (download to local) - E2E tests: Copy without files (<3s) - E2E tests: Copy with 10MB files (<10s) - E2E tests: File migration failure rollback (simulate network failure, verify thread not created) - E2E tests: Copy semantics (original thread unchanged, both threads exist) - Integration tests: Cache invalidation (verify project threads cache updated) - Performance tests: Copy timing benchmarks

ideas.idea: Test right-click on project thread shows "Copy to Personal"
Test right-click on personal thread shows "Copy to Project..."
Test copy to personal: owner succeeds, non-owner fails
E2E: Copy project thread to personal, verify all messages copied
E2E: Copy project thread with files, verify files downloaded to local
Test project selection dialog filters by editor/owner roles
Test copy to project: editor succeeds, viewer fails
E2E: Copy personal thread with files, verify files uploaded to Storage Service
Performance: Copy thread without files, verify <3s
Performance: Copy thread with 10MB files, verify <10s
E2E: Simulate file upload failure, verify thread copy rolled back
E2E: Verify original thread unchanged after copy, both threads exist
Integration: Verify project threads cache invalidated after copy
